subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Thou hast attained unto that which causeth joy to the Supreme Concourse and the Most Exalted Paradise. Blessed be thy deed inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد فائز شدی بانچه که سبب فرح ملا اعلی و جنت علیا بوده طوبی لعملک بما
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
